name: Rondelay Stuffed Snow Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, garlic, and parsley flakes in a food processor.
2. Process until smooth and well blended.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 8-96 hours.
4. Remove stems and strings from the snow peas.
5. Slice along one edge to remove the peas.
6. Blanch the snow peas in boiling water for 10-15 seconds.
7. Immediately immerse them in ice water to cool and crisp.
8. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes or more.
9. Allow the cheese mixture to warm slightly.
10. Spoon the mixture into a pastry bag fitted with a large star tip.
11. Pipe the mixture into the snow pea pods.
12. Arrange on a serving platter.
13. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
